name: Advanced Crystal Beast Sapphire Pegasus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アドバンスド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> サファイア・ペガサス
desc: If "Advanced Dark" is not in a Field Zone, send this monster to the GY. If this card is Summoned: You can place 1 of your "Advanced Crystal Beast" monsters that is banished, or in your hand, Deck, or GY, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.
mnst_eff: If "Advanced Dark" is not in a Field Zone, send this monster to the GY. If this card is Summoned: You can place 1 of your "Advanced Crystal Beast" monsters that is banished, or in your hand, Deck, or GY, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.
eff: If "Advanced Dark" is not in a Field Zone, send this monster to the GY. If this card is Summoned: You can place 1 of your "Advanced Crystal Beast" monsters that is banished, or in your hand, Deck, or GY, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
Places cards from hand in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
Places the player's banished cards in Spell & Trap Zone
Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
Places destroyed cards in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
